Container.Name: GitHub Azure CI Runner Agent
Container.Overview: Self-hosted CI runner for GitHub Actions and Azure Pipelines. Run builds directly on Unraid with optional embedded Docker support. Supports GitHub Actions runners, Azure DevOps Pipelines agents, PowerShell 7, and Docker builds inside the container. Designed for home lab CI/CD, private automation pipelines, and self-hosted build infrastructure. Keywords: GitHub runner, GitHub Actions, Azure Pipelines, Azure DevOps agent, CI/CD, self-hosted runner, Docker builds.

Config.Name: Runner Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for runner configuration, work folders, updates, and embedded Docker data. Use a unique appdata path per container. Do not map this to /runner.

Config.Name: Use Azure Pipelines Agent
Config.Description: Set to true to enable Azure Pipelines Agent. If false, all Azure DevOps fields are ignored.

Config.Name: Azure DevOps URL
Config.Description: Azure DevOps organization URL. Example: https://dev.azure.com/myorg

Config.Name: Azure DevOps PAT
Config.Description: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token with Agent Pools Read and manage permission. Required only when Use Azure Pipelines Agent is true.

Config.Name: Azure Agent Pool
Config.Description: Azure DevOps Agent Pool name. The pool must already exist in Azure DevOps. Default: SelfHosted.

Config.Name: Azure Agent Name
Config.Description: Name shown for this agent in Azure DevOps.

Config.Name: Azure Agent Work Folder
Config.Description: Azure Pipelines work folder. Leave as _work unless you need a custom path.

Config.Name: Use GitHub Actions Runner
Config.Description: Set to true to enable GitHub Actions Runner. If false, all GitHub fields are ignored.

Config.Name: GitHub Scope
Config.Description: Use repo for a repository runner, or org for an organization-level runner.

Config.Name: GitHub Repository URL
Config.Description: GitHub repository URL. Required only when GitHub Scope is repo. Example: https://github.com/myorg/myrepo

Config.Name: GitHub Organization
Config.Description: GitHub organization name. Required only when GitHub Scope is org. Example: myorg

Config.Name: GitHub PAT
Config.Description: GitHub Personal Access Token used to register the runner. For repo scope, grant Administration Read and Write on the selected repository. Required only when Use GitHub Actions Runner is true.

Config.Name: GitHub Runner Name
Config.Description: Name shown for this runner in GitHub.

Config.Name: GitHub Runner Labels
Config.Description: Comma-separated labels used to target this runner in workflows. Default: SelfHosted. Example: SelfHosted,unraid,docker

Config.Name: GitHub Runner Work Folder
Config.Description: GitHub Actions work folder. Leave as _work unless you need a custom path.

Config.Name: Enable Embedded Docker
Config.Description: Set to true to enable Docker builds inside the runner container. Requires Extra Parameters to include --privileged.

Config.Name: Docker Storage Driver
Config.Description: Storage driver used by embedded Docker. Default vfs is slower but works reliably with Unraid appdata paths such as /mnt/user/appdata. Use overlay2 only if Runner Data is mapped to a path or filesystem that supports overlay mounts, for example a suitable cache or disk path.

Config.Name: Advanced Docker Options
Config.Description: Optional extra options passed to the embedded Docker daemon. Leave empty unless troubleshooting or customizing Docker.
